title: Another eco triumph for Swartvlei Beach
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Swartvlei Beach continues its...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Swartvlei Beach continues its rise as a standout eco-tourism destination, securing the esteemed Green Coast status from the Wildlife & Environment Society of South Africa (Wessa) for the second consecutive year.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Swartvlei Beach continues its rise as a standout eco-tourism destination, securing the esteemed Green Coast status from the Wildlife & Environment Society of South Africa (Wessa) for the second consecutive year."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This achievement reaffirms the municipality's commitment to environmental stewardship and its productive partnership with the Strandloper Project."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The award was officially presented at the Royal St Andrews Hotel in Port Alfred on Friday 31 October.","html":"The award was officially presented at the Royal St Andrews Hotel in Port Alfred on Friday 31 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Deputy Mayor and chairperson for the Planning, Economic Development and Tourism Portfolio, Morton Gericke, said the accolade reflects the municipality's ongoing dedication to protecting and promoting one of its most treasured coastal assets.","html":"Knysna Deputy Mayor and chairperson for the Planning, Economic Development and Tourism Portfolio, Morton Gericke, said the accolade reflects the municipality's ongoing dedication to protecting and promoting one of its most treasured coastal assets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Wessa's Green Coast Award recognises biodiverse coastal sites that attract outdoor enthusiasts and nature lovers,\" Gericke explained.","html":"\"Wessa's Green Coast Award recognises biodiverse coastal sites that attract outdoor enthusiasts and nature lovers,\" Gericke explained."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"It highlights destinations where municipalities and communities work together to safeguard ecosystems, encourage responsible tourism, and support education and research."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Being honoured again elevates Swartvlei Beach's profile, placing this lesser-known gem on both the local and global tourism stage.\"","html":"Being honoured again elevates Swartvlei Beach's profile, placing this lesser-known gem on both the local and global tourism stage.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To maintain Green Coast status, appli-cants must consistently meet rigorous criteria. These include universal access for visitors, clear signage, effective monitoring of domestic animals, responsible waste management, well-maintained ablution facilities, and active eco-tourism programmes.","html":"To maintain Green Coast status, appli-cants must consistently meet rigorous criteria. These include universal access for visitors, clear signage, effective monitoring of domestic animals, responsible waste management, well-maintained ablution facilities, and active eco-tourism programmes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Applicants must also protect at least one key feature - whether a sensitive habitat, important species, or cultural heritage site. Knysna Municipality's dedicated environmental management team has once again met these benchmarks, ensuring Swartvlei Beach sets a high standard for others to follow.","html":"Applicants must also protect at least one key feature - whether a sensitive habitat, important species, or cultural heritage site. Knysna Municipality's dedicated environmental management team has once again met these benchmarks, ensuring Swartvlei Beach sets a high standard for others to follow."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Gericke encouraged residents to make the most of their award-winning coastline. \"This festive season, we invite locals to reconnect with Swartvlei Beach."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Enjoy its unspoiled sands, fresh sea air, and the sense of pride that comes with knowing our community safeguards something truly special.","html":"\"Enjoy its unspoiled sands, fresh sea air, and the sense of pride that comes with knowing our community safeguards something truly special."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Visitors exploring the Garden Route should also add Swartvlei to their travel plans and experience a coastal environment that is both welcoming and carefully protected.\"","html":"Visitors exploring the Garden Route should also add Swartvlei to their travel plans and experience a coastal environment that is both welcoming and carefully protected.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He extended his appreciation to Wessa, the Strandloper Project, Sedgefield residents, and the Environmental Management team under the Director of Planning and Development, Andiswa Dunywa.","html":"He extended his appreciation to Wessa, the Strandloper Project, Sedgefield residents, and the Environmental Management team under the Director of Planning and Development, Andiswa Dunywa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Green Coast status brings improved tourism infrastructure, enhanced coastal ecosystem management, skills development, and greater public awareness. It is a collective win for everyone who values South Africa's remarkable shoreline.\"","html":"\"Green Coast status brings improved tourism infrastructure, enhanced coastal ecosystem management, skills development, and greater public awareness. It is a collective win for everyone who values South Africa's remarkable shoreline.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Another eco triumph for Swartvlei Beach
